title: Object Byte Offset Triplet (0x2D)
description: Specifies a byte offset for an object within the document. Offsets 0 and 1 (length and TID) are standard and omitted here; the remaining fields are relative to the triplet payload start (first payload byte at offset 2).

elements.name: DirByOff
elements.description: Low-order 4 bytes of the byte offset (big-endian). If bytes 6-9 are not present, the object offset is expressed in this field; otherwise combine with DirByHi. Value X'FFFFFFFF' indicates the object is outside the document.

elements.name: DirByHi
elements.description: High-order 4 bytes of the byte offset (big-endian). Present only when the triplet length is 10.
